items.name_en: 💖《Complete with original boutique packaging》💖【New】The circular interlocking double-G motif draws inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, adding color to the leather accessories as always. This Original GG canvas card holder features this 1970s style motif in a luxurious way, contrasting with the contrasting stitching details, showcasing elegant taste. The interior is carefully designed with multiple compartments for various uses.
items.name_cn:
💖《Complete with original boutique packaging》💖【New】The circular interlocking double-G motif draws inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, adding color to the leather accessories as always. This Original GG canvas card holder features this 1970s style motif in a luxurious way, contrasting with the contrasting stitching details, showcasing elegant taste. The interior is carefully designed with multiple compartments for various uses.
Beige and dark brown Original GG canvas
Brown leather trim with contrasting stitching
Taffeta lining
Circular interlocking double-G details
Interior: card slots, 1 coin pocket
Snap closure
Model: 818811.
Open dimensions: 22cm (W) x 9cm (H); Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Weight: approx. 80g
Color: Canvas brown/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💖With full original retail packaging💖【New】The classic interlocking pattern turns small daily essentials into fashion accessories. Novel textures and finishes continue to shine in Gucci's new collection, showcasing vibrant energy and personality. This fully zippered wallet is crafted from deep grey and black grained calfskin, adorned with the GG logo throughout.

items.name_en: M14680 Monogram White Color. Nicolas Ghesquière presents the Rivage BB handbag for 2025 Spring/Summer, reinterpreting the Noctambule bag launched in 1999, cut from Monogram canvas in a bucket silhouette. Hard case style handle, engraved lock, and leather luggage tag highlight classic elements; wear the strap for convenient crossbody carrying. Dimensions: 18*7*12cm.

items.name_en: Reproduction M12317 This Nano Bucket features the brand's new Monogram Mini pattern from the 2024 Fall/Winter collection, creating the latest version of the classic Monogram canvas. The design is accented with gold metal hardware, featuring an internal pocket and a detachable leather key charm, along with double top handles and an adjustable shoulder strap for multiple carrying options. 13 x 17 x 9 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag【M13084】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag【M13084】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
This Handbag East West Sj bag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami Re-edition series, depicting the full Monogram pattern with the artist's signature rainbow tones. The horizontal silhouette features fluid lines, top handles, nail-studded side straps, a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, and LV xTM key pouch, all accented with calfskin details. The refined corners pay homage to the brand's traditional trunks.
Size: 27 x 14 x 10 cm

items.name_cn:
LV x TM COUSSIN Small Handbag【m13233】White/Three Colors (Takashi Murakami)
This Coussin Gx small handbag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami Re-edition series, crafted from fluffy sheepskin to create a sleek silhouette, presented with a full Monogram pattern in the rainbow tones of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The bold metal chain and detachable leather shoulder strap offer multiple carrying styles.
Size: 20 x 12 x 26 cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: SIDE TRUNK Medium Handbag【M14046】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
SIDE TRUNK Medium Handbag【M14046】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
This Side Trunk Sj medium handbag captures the playful spirit of the Murakami edition series with a whimsical Monogram pattern, incorporating reinforced metal corners and the iconic S-lock clasp into soft calfskin. It easily accommodates daily essentials. The square silhouette pays homage to the brand's classic trunks, with a detachable nail-studded handle and shoulder strap for flexible carrying.
Size: 23.5 x 16 x 8.5 cm.

specs.rawTitle:
SIDE TRUNK Medium Handbag【M14046】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)

items.name_en: NANO SPEEDY Handbag【M13391】White Multicolor m13406 Black Multicolor (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
NANO SPEEDY Handbag【M13391】White Multicolor m13406 Black Multicolor (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
Crafted from classic Monogram Hl canvas, the Nano Speedy handbag exudes ultimate femininity and is an ideal choice for carrying daily items. This handbag is the perfect miniature version of the original Speedy, featuring exquisite stitching and being incredibly lightweight. ✨Shoulder strap is detachable and adjustable
Size 16.0 x 11.0 x 9.0 cm.

items.name_cn:
LV x TM POCHETTE ACCESSOIRES Handbag【m13663】Black Multicolor m13404 White Multicolor (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami)
This Pochette Accessoires PPXL handbag is made of coated canvas, interpreting the dynamic style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series with a colorful Monogram pattern. Calfskin trim and dazzling metal hardware accentuate the refined details, with a detachable shoulder strap and chain for flexible carrying.
Size: 13 x 4 x 22 cm.

items.name_en: 【Nano Diane Bag】M14194 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【Nano Diane Bag】M14194 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
The Nano Diane in two-tone Monogram Empreinte HlLt leather is a miniature version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all the key details of the original design, including a round flap, piped edges, and a strap-style magnetic closure. Its detachable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options.
Size: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm

items.name_en: 【ALMA BB Bag】M13078 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【ALMA BB Bag】M13078 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This Alma BB St bag exudes the joyful style of the collaboration series, cleverly revisiting the 1930s Art Deco design. The Monogram coated canvas renders the whimsical tones of Takashi Murakami, while the Toron handle, base, detachable shoulder strap, and key pouch incorporate classic calfskin elements.
Size: 23.5 x 17.5 x 11.5 cm

items.name_cn:

items.name_cn:

The High Rise LT waist pack is shaped by soft Monogram coated canvas for a close-to-body fit, with a lightweight design that fits inside a jacket. Calfskin creates a detachable nameplate, and the fabric shoulder strap adds a dynamic touch.
Size: 16 x 8 x 38 cm
